content.en:
The strength of the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor is about the same as that of the Eternal Dao Ancestor, and it can be regarded as the best among the half-step domain ancestors, slightly weaker than the Qinglong Palace Lord.

But the key is that the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor and the Eternal Dao Ancestor are proficient in the Forbidden Time Dao and the Forbidden Space Dao respectively, and the power of the two combined is far greater than one plus one, so when the Divine Ruin Dao Ancestor participates in the battle, he and the Eternal Dao Ancestor instantly suppress the Qinglong Palace Lord.

Collapse!

The Qinglong Palace Lord was instantly blasted away by the two forbidden Dao Techniques of the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, and the Qinglong Sword in his hand also collapsed and flew out, but he was summoned to his hand again.

I saw blood spilling from the hand of the master of the Qinglong Palace, although it was not an injury, but it represented a signal.

He can't defeat the alliance of the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor and the Eternal Dao Ancestor!

Rumble!!

The White Tiger Palace Lord and the True Martial Palace Lord also descended, came to the side of the Qinglong Palace Lord, and confronted the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor and the Eternal Dao Ancestor.

"Qinglong Palace Lord, revoke the previous notice, the Heavenly Emperor Palace is absolutely not allowed to collect the resources of the major forces, nor is it allowed to order other forces to do things, if the Heavenly Emperor Palace wants to accept subsidiary forces, it is your business, but the Upper Triple Heaven Forces are not allowed to become subsidiary forces!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor proposed.

The Green Dragon Palace Lord still wanted to get angry, but the White Tiger Palace Lord on the side agreed: "Yes!"

As soon as these words came out, it could be regarded as the Heavenly Emperor's Palace softened.

The Green Dragon Palace Lord was very angry and looked at the White Tiger Palace Lord: "White Tiger Palace Lord, why did you agree? With the strength of our Heavenly Emperor Palace, there is no need to be afraid of them Black Wind Mountain!"

I don't know what the White Tiger Palace Lord said, after hearing this, the Qinglong Palace Lord quickly calmed down, turned around and left the space-time turbulence area with the White Tiger Palace Lord and the True Martial Palace Master, and returned to the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

The Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor and the Eternal Dao Ancestor also turned around and left!

The three half-step domain ancestors of the Mitian Sect, the Tianhai Sect, and the Ten Thousand Domains Divine Temple also left one by one, and the space-time turbulence began to stabilize, and it wouldn't be long before this place recovered.

The many Dao Ancestors who were watching also withdrew their divine consciousness one by one, and they discussed privately one by one.

This time.

Although the Heavenly Emperor Palace showed terrifying strength, the other forces, especially the Black Wind Mountain, actually sent two half-step domain ancestors at once, which was enough to deter all the forces, and they all listed the Black Wind Mountain as a huge force second only to the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

......

Terran.

There was a person standing next to Ye Tian, it was Ouyang Jiu'er.

At this time, Ouyang Jiu'er also stepped into the realm of Dao Ancestor.

"Jiu'er, the strength of the Heavenly Emperor Palace doesn't seem to be very strong, I didn't expect that Black Wind Mountain actually has two half-step domain ancestors, in that case, Black Wind Mountain will be able to compete with the Heavenly Emperor Palace by casually uniting a Nine Heavens force!"

Ye Tian said in a low voice.

"Brother Ye, you have underestimated the power of the Vast Sea Realm! Find the Divine Heaven Realm and expose all your strength, it will be not long before you will be destroyed, if there is no great war to destroy the sect, you don't know how terrifying the background of a force is, are you sure that the Heavenly Emperor Palace only has three half-step domain ancestors?"

"This ......"

Ye Tian shook his head, he couldn't guarantee it.

"Not to mention anything else, there are definitely more than two half-step domain ancestors in Black Wind Mountain!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"What, there are more than two half-step domain ancestors in Black Wind Mountain?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Ouyang Jiu'er smiled and said, "Do you remember the three mountain masters I mentioned to you?"

"Remember!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Eternal Dao Ancestor and Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor are not mountain masters, they are the first generation of Time Kings and Sky Kings, and they are subordinate to the three mountain masters!" Ouyang Jiu'er explained: "The identities of the three mountain masters were also very mysterious and too ancient, there was no information to record them, and even I didn't know very well. But if they were alive, their strength would definitely be stronger than that of the King of Time and the King of the Sky! Besides, the first generation of the Ten Kings did not mean that they were the strongest! For example, your master is not your opponent now. Could it be that if he has a high seniority, his strength must be stronger than that of the latecomers?"

"Makes sense, too!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

In this way, the strength of Black Wind Mountain is too terrifying!

"Actually, this time, the Heavenly Emperor Palace doesn't really want to dominate the major forces, they're just tempting!" Ouyang Jiu'er guessed.

"Temptation, could it be that Qinglong has been acting before?"

Ye Tian frowned.

"It's not enough to act, but the Qinglong Palace Lord just wants to force out the half-step domain ancestors hidden behind the scenes, this time he can force out five half-step domain ancestors, and the purpose of the Heavenly Emperor Palace has been achieved!"

"The power of the Heavenly Emperor Palace has been hidden a lot, and this time it has not been exposed, but the palace master is indeed the strongest combat power of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace has hidden some half-step domain ancestors at most, and it is not as deep as the Black Wind Mountain! But after all, there are living domain ancestors in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and they have left a lot of hole cards, maybe some hole cards can kill a half-step domain ancestor with one blow!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

Listening to Ouyang Jiu'er's narration, Ye Tian had to sigh that almost all of the forces in these Divine Heaven Realm were LYB, and all the forces in the Daoshan Realm were very simple, and there was almost no hidden power.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the small realm of the Wind King.

This time, he came to see the Wind King, and by the way, he became the Heavenly King of Black Wind Mountain, after all, he was already a Dao Ancestor, and it was not suitable to serve as a Heavenly General again.

Of course, the status of the Heavenly General itself is higher than that of the ordinary Heavenly King, so Ye Tian becoming the Heavenly King is not an ordinary Heavenly King, but a Great Heavenly King, above the other Heavenly Kings and afraid of the Ten Kings.

-------------------

"Wind King!"

Ye Tian saw the true body of the Wind King, the difference from before was that the Wind King was wearing a mask this time, and he couldn't know his true face, obviously the face revealed by the previous consciousness incarnation must be a conjugation, not a real face, otherwise there is no need to represent the mask now.

"Nine Extremes Heavenly General, you are here, no, you should be called the Nine Extremes Heavenly King!"

Wind King Road.

Immediately, the Wind King took out the Heavenly King Order, and it was a pure black Heavenly King Order containing taboo rules, which was a rare Great Heavenly King Order in Black Wind Mountain.

The Wind King handed over the Great Heavenly King Order to Ye Tian, representing Ye Tian to become the Great Heavenly King of Black Wind Mountain.

Subsequently, a feast was held inside the Black Wind Mountain to celebrate Ye Tian becoming the Great Heavenly King, and there were not only many Heavenly Kings in the dojo, but also the Wind King, the Fire King, the Gold King, the Wood King, the Ice King, and the Time King.

However, the invincible Dao Ancestors and the half-step domain ancestors who were high above were not everywhere.

This is also normal, if there is a feast of a great heavenly king, they all need to be present, won't they have to be busy to death?

If it weren't for the Heavenly Emperor Palace's persecution of the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor to be born this time, otherwise even the Heavenly Kings of Black Wind Mountain would not know that Black Wind Mountain was so powerful!

After the feast was held, Ye Tian entered the Heavenly King Library in Black Wind Mountain.

This time, he was going to pick out some Great Thousand Dao Techniques to cultivate!
